title: olearia covenyi
intro: Olearia covenyi, also known as tree daisy or mountain daisy, is a flowering plant native to New Zealand. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Olearia covenyi include reducing inflammation and fighting off infections, as well as supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of Olearia covenyi can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures to utilize its medicinal properties.
